history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian woman with a cheerful expression and a wink stands in front of a white ornate metal gate. She has her hair pulled up in a messy bun with some strands framing her face. She is wearing a black t-shirt with white stripes on the sleeves and a small white logo on the chest, likely Adidas. Her pants are tight-fitting black jeans. She is carrying a black and white patterned tote bag in her left hand and a black bracelet adorns her right wrist. Her shoes are high-top sneakers with white and black accents. The background shows a dimly lit building with a yellow and brown facade, possibly a restaurant or cafe, with some tables and chairs visible inside. The lighting is soft and ambient, creating a slightly warm glow. The overall mood is playful and casual. The color palette is dominated by black and white, with pops of yellow and brown in the background.
